text: This place feels quietly electric—a modern hallway with glass-walled rooms and the promise of collective thought. The R+D sign pulls me in, evoking curiosity and a sense of anticipation. Here, the spirit of invention hovers in the air. I am on the cusp of ideas coming alive, participating in humanity’s ongoing dialogue with knowledge and innovation. It’s both grounding and exhilarating to stand on this edge between the routine and the possible.
